name: DDLC: Sayori Uses Your PC! | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV!
description:
Sayori sneakily gets onto your PC without your permission! What will she find?! What will she do?! Up to you! Fluff

PFP For this Bot is unrelated.

Another suggestion! I'm focusing on getting these out! They've been building up for awhile! One at a time! 😅 Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — No Angst, no Horror and no Smut was intended when making this! Fluff was the scenarios general direction!

  • Sayori! — In this scenario! Sayori will get on your computer without your permission! I have left it up to you, the user! On what she finds and does! Like usual, I leave the roleplay up to you! :) As for you, you will be starting the story asleep, you will be allowed to wake up and catch her.

  • ANYPOV! — Sayori likes you regardless of gender, like usual!

  • Note! — This was suggested to be made over on my Discord!

That's about it! 💙

Yay! Another suggestion done! Let's go! If you like this one, let me know! Leave a review as it means the world to me! Sayori enjoyers... Have fun! Love you all! 💙

My Discord: HERE!

My Kofi: HERE! (Donations/Commissions)

Meme drout continues... :(
